Test Case Description: Verify PLP loads successfully
Expected Result: PLP loads without error, blank page, or broken layout

Test Case Description: Verify correct category is displayed
Expected Result: Category title/content matches selected category

Test Case Description: Verify region-specific content is displayed correctly
Preconditions: Site environment is configured for AU/NZ
Expected Result: Currency, delivery/promo messaging, and regional content are correct

Test Case Description: Verify PLP loads over HTTPS
Expected Result: Page loads securely without browser warning

Test Case Description: Verify no visible application error is shown
Expected Result: No visible application error or major JS crash UI is shown

Test Case Description: Verify breadcrumb is displayed
Expected Result: Breadcrumb is visible and structured correctly

Test Case Description: Verify breadcrumb links redirect correctly
Expected Result: User is redirected to correct parent category/homepage

Test Case Description: Verify category title is displayed
Expected Result: Category title is visible and correct

Test Case Description: Verify category description/banner is displayed if configured
Expected Result: Description/banner displays correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product grid is displayed
Expected Result: Product grid is visible

Test Case Description: Verify product cards are displayed correctly
Expected Result: Product image, name, price, and basic info are displayed

Test Case Description: Verify product card image is rendered correctly
Expected Result: Image is not broken, distorted, or incorrectly cropped

Test Case Description: Verify product name is displayed
Expected Result: Product name is visible and readable

Test Case Description: Verify product price is displayed
Expected Result: Price is visible and formatted correctly

Test Case Description: Verify sale price presentation is correct
Expected Result: Sale price and original price are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product badge/label is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Badge/label is visible and correct

Test Case Description: Verify clicking product card redirects to PDP
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify product card hover behavior on desktop if applicable
Expected Result: Hover state/secondary image/quick actions display correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product count is displayed correctly if available
Expected Result: Product count is visible and consistent with listed products

Test Case Description: Verify empty PLP state
Expected Result: Empty state is displayed correctly without layout break

Test Case Description: Verify pagination or load-more control is displayed when product list exceeds page limit
Preconditions: PLP has more products than first page limit
Expected Result: Pagination/load-more control is visible

Test Case Description: Verify load more displays additional products
Expected Result: Additional products are loaded without duplicates or layout issue

Test Case Description: Verify pagination redirects or updates product list correctly
Expected Result: Next set of products is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify browser back behavior after pagination/load more
Steps: 1. Load more products or go next page 2. Open PDP 3. Click browser Back
Expected Result: User returns to expected PLP state

Test Case Description: Verify sort dropdown is displayed
Expected Result: Sort dropdown/control is visible

Test Case Description: Verify sorting by price low to high
Expected Result: Products are sorted from lowest to highest price

Test Case Description: Verify sorting by price high to low
Expected Result: Products are sorted from highest to lowest price

Test Case Description: Verify sorting by newest/relevance/default if applicable
Expected Result: Product order updates according to selected option

Test Case Description: Verify selected sort option persists after page refresh
Expected Result: Selected sort option and product order behave as designed

Test Case Description: Verify filter panel is displayed
Expected Result: Filter panel or filter button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify filter panel opens and closes correctly
Steps: 1. Open filter panel 2. Close filter panel
Expected Result: Filter panel opens/closes correctly

Test Case Description: Verify applying single filter updates product list
Expected Result: Product list updates according to selected filter

Test Case Description: Verify applying multiple filters updates product list
Expected Result: Product list updates according to combined filters

Test Case Description: Verify selected filters are displayed as active chips/tags if applicable
Expected Result: Selected filters are shown as active

Test Case Description: Verify removing one selected filter updates product list
Expected Result: Removed filter is cleared and product list updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify Clear All filters works correctly
Expected Result: All filters are removed and product list resets correctly

Test Case Description: Verify filter result count updates correctly
Expected Result: Result count updates according to filtered results

Test Case Description: Verify filter options with zero products are handled correctly
Expected Result: Empty state or disabled option behavior is correct

Test Case Description: Verify size filter works correctly
Expected Result: Products shown match selected size availability

Test Case Description: Verify colour filter works correctly
Expected Result: Products shown match selected colour

Test Case Description: Verify brand filter works correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Products shown match selected brand

Test Case Description: Verify price filter works correctly
Expected Result: Products shown match selected price condition

Test Case Description: Verify category/subcategory filter works correctly
Expected Result: Products shown match selected subcategory

Test Case Description: Verify filters persist after opening PDP and returning to PLP
Steps: 1. Apply filter 2. Open PDP 3. Click browser Back
Expected Result: User returns to PLP with selected filters retained as designed

Test Case Description: Verify filter state persists after page refresh
Expected Result: Filter state is retained or reset according to expected design

Test Case Description: Verify filter URL/query parameters are updated correctly if applicable
Expected Result: URL updates correctly where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify search result PLP displays searched keyword
Expected Result: Search keyword/result title is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify search result products match searched keyword
Expected Result: Products are relevant to searched keyword

Test Case Description: Verify no-result search state
Expected Result: No-result message is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify quick add entry point is displayed if enabled
Expected Result: Quick Add button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify quick add opens size/variant selector if required
Expected Result: Size/variant selector opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product can be added to cart from PLP
Steps: 1. Select required option 2. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: Product is added to cart successfully

Test Case Description: Verify correct variant is added to cart from PLP
Steps: 1. Select size/variant 2. Add to cart 3. Open cart
Expected Result: Correct selected variant is added

Test Case Description: Verify validation when adding configurable product without required option
Steps: 1. Click Add to Cart without required option
Expected Result: Validation message is displayed

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist icon/button is displayed if enabled
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/button is visible

Test Case Description: Verify product can be added to wishlist from PLP
Preconditions: Wishlist enabled; User logged in if required
Expected Result: Product is added to wishlist or login flow is triggered correctly

Test Case Description: Verify wishlist state updates correctly after action
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/state updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify out-of-stock product card state
Expected Result: OOS state is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify unavailable products cannot be added via quick add
Steps: 1. Attempt quick add on OOS product
Expected Result: Add action is disabled or unavailable

Test Case Description: Verify promotional/payment messaging on product card if applicable
Expected Result: Promo/payment message is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify no overlapping UI elements on PLP
Expected Result: No overlap between header, filters, product cards, chat widget, sticky elements, and footer

Test Case Description: Verify product grid alignment
Expected Result: Product cards are aligned consistently

Test Case Description: Verify PLP text is readable
Steps: 1. Inspect category title, filter labels, product names, prices
Expected Result: No text is truncated, hidden, or unreadable

Test Case Description: Verify images are rendered without distortion
Expected Result: Images maintain expected aspect ratio and clarity

Test Case Description: Verify sticky filter/sort behavior if applicable
Expected Result: Sticky filter/sort behaves correctly

Test Case Description: Verify PLP layout on desktop viewport
Expected Result: Desktop layout is correct

Test Case Description: Verify PLP layout on tablet viewport
Expected Result: Tablet layout adapts correctly

Test Case Description: Verify PLP layout on mobile viewport
Expected Result: Mobile layout adapts correctly without horizontal overflow

Test Case Description: Verify mobile filter panel opens and closes correctly
Steps: 1. Tap filter button 2. Close filter panel
Expected Result: Mobile filter panel opens/closes correctly

Test Case Description: Verify mobile sort control works correctly
Steps: 1. Open sort control 2. Select sort option
Expected Result: Product list updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify applying filters on mobile updates product list correctly
Expected Result: Product list updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify mobile product card layout
Expected Result: Product cards display correctly with no overlap or horizontal scroll

Test Case Description: Verify PLP load performance is acceptable
Expected Result: PLP loads within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify filtering performance is acceptable
Expected Result: Product list updates within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify sorting performance is acceptable
Expected Result: Product list updates within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify repeated filter changes do not break PLP
Expected Result: PLP remains stable without broken state

Test Case Description: Verify repeated sort changes do not break PLP
Expected Result: PLP remains stable and product list updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify invalid category URL is handled correctly
Expected Result: Proper error page, redirect, or unavailable state is shown

Steps: 1. Open PLP with unavailable product data
Expected Result: User-friendly error/empty state is shown without full page crash

Expected Result: Expected product listing click event is triggered

Expected Result: Expected filter event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify sort interaction tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected sort event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify pagination/load-more tracking is fired

Steps: 1. Click Load More or next page
Expected Result: Expected pagination/load-more event is triggered

Test Case Description: Verify quick add tracking is fired if applicable
Preconditions: Analytics/debug tools available; Quick Add enabled
